articles.title: German gross domestic product in the 4th quarter of 2025 up 0.3% on the previous quarter
articles.summary: The gross domestic product (GDP) rose by 0.3% in the fourth quarter of 2025 compared with the third quarter of 2025 after adjustment for price, seasonal and calendar variations. In particular, household and government final consumption expenditure increased.

articles.title: Is America's economic slip temporary? Trump, Biden allies divided over GDP report
articles.summary: U.S. GDP shrank at an annual rate of 0.3% in the first quarter of 2025, marking the first decline in three years. Experts attribute the contraction to a surge in imports as businesses stocked up before Trump's tariffs took effect. Despite the decline, key ...

articles.title: Canada gross domestic product by industry, November 2025
articles.summary: Real gross domestic product (GDP) was essentially unchanged in November, following a 0.3% decline in October, as contractions in goods-producing industries offset expansions in services-producing industries.

articles.title: Robust consumer spending, rising exports fuel US economic growth in third quarter
articles.summary: WASHINGTON, Dec 23 (Reuters) - The U.S. economy grew at its fastest pace in two years in the third quarter, fueled by robust consumer spending and a sharp rebound in exports, though momentum appears to have faded amid the rising cost of living and recent ...

articles.title: RBI holds GDP and CPI inflation projections for FY27 — here's why
articles.summary: The new series of CPI (base year 2024) is to be released on Feb. 12, 2026. The new series of GDP (base year 2022-23) is slated for release on Feb 27, 2026.
